_schema: PO adoption by client segment (unit-count buckets) and by release track.
_notes: release_track is unavailable in Redshift (details JSONB not mirrored). Both Rapid and Standard are shown as null until DBRE surfaces cluster_id.
'transacting_12mo' = distinct client_ids that created at least one PO in the last 12 months.
Segment thresholds match Pallavi's original: Enterprise >= 500 units, Mid-Market 100-499, Small < 100, Unknown = no property records.

by_release_track._reason_null: cluster_id (source of release track) is not mirrored to Redshift; see po-kpis.json _notes.
